title: Executive Order 5467—Reservoir-Site Restoration No. 10, California
text:
So much of the order of June 8, 1926, creating Reservoir-Site Reserve No. 17, as affects the lands hereinafter described, is hereby revoked:
California
MOUNT DIABLO MERIDIAN
T. 1 S., R. 15 E., sec. 27, SW. ¼ of SE. ¼.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
October 22, 1930.
